---
title: "getMH1SST_Sci.py"
toc: false
page-layout: full
number-sections: false
---

[← Back to workflow](../../mh1-processor.html)

Science quality MODIS-Aqua SST retrieval and qual_sst masking.

::: {.code-shell}

```{.python}
{{< include ../../workflows/mh1-mpoc-mpic-processor/scripts/MH1/getMH1SST_Sci.py >}}
```

:::
